d:
Passive. When a battle starts, Alna blankets the battlefield in frost, reducing Haste by [[40]] and range by [[2]] tiles for all units except herself.
Active. Alna lets out a battle cry and summons a blizzard, which removes the Haste buffs from all enemies and deals [[40%]]<ATK> damage to each enemy every [[0.5]]s for [[8]]s. While the blizzard is active, when Alna or the Winter Warrior takes damage, they recover [[50%]] of the HP lost from that damage over the next [[10]]s.
Increases the impact damage to [[45%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[50%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[55%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[60%]]<ATK>.

During battle preparation, Alna selects an ally placed in the same row as herself to become the Winter Warrior. That ally is immune to Winter Anthem's Haste reduction effect, and their max HP is permanently increased by [[15%]].
Active. Alna thrusts her spear to deal [[340%]]<ATK> damage to enemies, restoring [[100%]] HP to herself and the Winter Warrior.
Increases the impact damage to [[360%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[380%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[400%]]<ATK>.

Alna repeatedly swings her spear, striking enemies within a 1-tile arc in front of her twice, with each hit dealing [[120%]]<ATK> damage. She then sweeps her spear around, dealing [[240%]]<ATK> damage to all surrounding enemies and reducing their Haste by [[50]] for [[8]]s.
Increases the damage of the first 2 strikes to [[130%]]<ATK>, and the final strike to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of the first 2 strikes to [[140%]]<ATK>, and the final strike to [[280%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of the first 2 strikes to [[150%]]<ATK>, and the final strike to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Reduces damage taken by [[10%]] during battle. For every [[10]]s the battle lasts, the damage reduction increases by [[5%]], stacking up to [[5]] times.
Reduces damage taken by [[14%]] during battle. For every [[10]]s the battle lasts, the damage reduction increases by [[6%]], stacking up to [[5]] times.
Reduces damage taken by [[18%]] during battle. For every [[10]]s the battle lasts, the damage reduction increases by [[7%]], stacking up to [[5]] times.
When a battle starts and every [[20]]s thereafter, Alna envelops herself in icy winds, becoming immune to damage and control effects for [[4]]s.
Extends this skill's damage and control immunity to [[5]]s.
Extends this skill's damage and control immunity to [[6]]s.

After casting Chilling Presence, Alna also grants the Winter Warrior the same immunity effects. The first time either Alna's or the Winter Warrior's HP drops below [[50%]] in battle, Chilling Presence triggers automatically for both. This effect can only be triggered [[1]] time per hero per battle.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, when HP drops below [[60%]], reduces damage taken by [[15%]] and recovers [[3%]] of lost HP per second for [[8]]s. Triggers up to once every [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 20 Crit Resist, 15 Ranged DEF.

d: Alna and her Winter Warrior gain a [[15%]] increase to their [[basic stats|basicattr]] until one of them is defeated. The first time either of them leaves the Chilling Presence state, Alna or the Winter Warrior will freeze enemies within [[1]] tile for [[2]]s and reduce those enemies' Vitality by [[50]] for [[10]]s.
